parameters.query:
SELECT
  cp.id as plan_id,
  cp.plan_data->>'opportunity_name' as plan_opp_name,
  cp.plan_data->>'gate_stage' as gate_stage,
  cp.plan_data->>'gate_review_date' as gate_review_date,
  cp.updated_at as plan_updated,
  ot.id as opp_id,
  ot.opp_title,
  ot.stage as opp_stage,
  ot.gda_label,
  CASE cp.plan_data->>'gate_stage'
    WHEN 'Gate 1' THEN 'Investigating'
    WHEN 'Gate 2' THEN 'Pursuing'
    WHEN 'Gate 3' THEN 'Proposal'
    WHEN 'Gate 4' THEN 'Submitted'
    ELSE NULL
  END as expected_opp_stage,
  CASE
    WHEN ot.id IS NULL THEN 'orphaned_plan'
    WHEN ot.stage IN ('Won','Lost','No-Go') THEN 'closed_opp'
    WHEN cp.plan_data->>'gate_stage' IS NOT NULL
      AND ot.stage != CASE cp.plan_data->>'gate_stage'
        WHEN 'Gate 1' THEN 'Investigating'
        WHEN 'Gate 2' THEN 'Pursuing'
        WHEN 'Gate 3' THEN 'Proposal'
        WHEN 'Gate 4' THEN 'Submitted'
        ELSE ot.stage END THEN 'stage_mismatch'
    ELSE 'in_sync'
  END as sync_status
FROM gda_capture_plans cp
LEFT JOIN gda_opportunity_tracker ot ON ot.id::text = cp.plan_data->>'opp_id'
WHERE cp.updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
HAVING CASE
  WHEN ot.id IS NULL THEN 'orphaned_plan'
  WHEN ot.stage IN ('Won','Lost','No-Go') THEN 'closed_opp'
  WHEN cp.plan_data->>'gate_stage' IS NOT NULL
    AND ot.stage != CASE cp.plan_data->>'gate_stage'
      WHEN 'Gate 1' THEN 'Investigating'
      WHEN 'Gate 2' THEN 'Pursuing'
      WHEN 'Gate 3' THEN 'Proposal'
      WHEN 'Gate 4' THEN 'Submitted'
      ELSE ot.stage END THEN 'stage_mismatch'
  ELSE 'in_sync'
END != 'in_sync'
ORDER BY cp.updated_at DESC;

UPDATE gda_opportunity_tracker SET stage = {{ $json.expected_opp_stage }}, updated_at = NOW(), notes = COALESCE(notes,'') || E'\n[Auto-sync ' || NOW()::date || '] Stage promoted by capture plan gate advance. Source: ' || {{ 'capture-opp-sync' }} WHERE id = {{ $json.opp_id }} AND {{ $json.opp_id }} IS NOT NULL AND {{ $json.expected_opp_stage }} IS NOT NULL RETURNING id, stage, opp_title;

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{status:'ok', message:'All capture plans and opp tracker stages are in sync', checked_at: new Date().toISOString()}}];

parameters.query:
UPDATE gda_capture_plans
SET plan_data = jsonb_set(plan_data, '{stage}', '"Pass"', true),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE plan_data->>'stage' IN ('Interest','Go/No-Go')
  AND plan_data->>'rfp_date' IS NOT NULL
  AND plan_data->>'rfp_date' != ''
  AND (plan_data->>'rfp_date')::date < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  AND plan_data->>'opportunity' IS NOT NULL
  AND plan_data->>'opportunity' != ''
RETURNING id, plan_data->>'opportunity' AS opportunity, plan_data->>'rfp_date' AS rfp_date, 'auto-passed' AS action;
